title: Grid
content:
### Grid Container

Turn an element into a grid container:

```html
<div class="grid">            /* display: grid */
<div class="inline-grid">    /* display: inline-grid */
```

### Grid Template Columns

Define the number and size of columns:

```html
<div class="grid grid-cols-1">    /* 1 column */
<div class="grid grid-cols-2">    /* 2 columns */
<div class="grid grid-cols-3">    /* 3 columns */
<div class="grid grid-cols-6">    /* 6 columns */
<div class="grid grid-cols-12">   /* 12 columns */
<div class="grid grid-cols-none"> /* no grid template */
```

### Grid Template Rows

```html
<div class="grid grid-rows-1">    /* 1 row */
<div class="grid grid-rows-3">    /* 3 rows */
<div class="grid grid-rows-none">
```

### Gap Utilities

Space between grid cells:

```html
<div class="grid gap-0">     /* gap: 0 */
<div class="grid gap-4">     /* gap: 1rem */
<div class="grid gap-x-8">   /* column gap: 2rem */
<div class="grid gap-y-2">   /* row gap: 0.5rem */
```

### Column Span

Make an item span multiple columns:

```html
<div class="col-span-1">  /* span 1 column */
<div class="col-span-2">  /* span 2 columns */
<div class="col-span-3">  /* span 3 columns */
<div class="col-span-full"> /* span all columns */
<div class="col-auto">    /* auto column span */
```

### Row Span

```html
<div class="row-span-1">  /* span 1 row */
<div class="row-span-2">  /* span 2 rows */
<div class="row-span-3">  /* span 3 rows */
<div class="row-span-full"> /* span all rows */
```

### Grid Flow

Control how auto-placed items fill the grid:

```html
<div class="grid grid-flow-row">    /* fill by row (default) */
<div class="grid grid-flow-col">    /* fill by column */
<div class="grid grid-flow-dense">  /* dense packing */
<div class="grid grid-flow-row-dense">
<div class="grid grid-flow-col-dense">
```

### Auto Columns & Auto Rows

```html
<div class="grid auto-cols-auto">   /* auto column width */
<div class="grid auto-cols-min">    /* min content */
<div class="grid auto-cols-max">    /* max content */
<div class="grid auto-cols-fr">     /* equal fractions */
<div class="grid auto-rows-auto">   /* auto row height */
<div class="grid auto-rows-min">    /* min content */
<div class="grid auto-rows-max">    /* max content */
<div class="grid auto-rows-fr">     /* equal fractions */
```

### Place Items & Place Content

```html
<div class="grid place-items-center">    /* center items in cells */
<div class="grid place-items-start">
<div class="grid place-items-end">
<div class="grid place-content-center">  /* center grid content */
<div class="grid place-content-between">
```
codeExample:
Item 1
Item 2
Item 3
Span 2 columns
Item 5
Full width row

quiz.question: Which class makes a grid item span across all columns?
What does grid-cols-3 do in Tailwind?
options: Creates a grid with 3 equal columns
